_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Employ approved defense-in-depth principles and practices (e.g., defense-in-multiple places, layered defenses, security robustness).
reference_document_element_description: Skill in conducting AI security assessments, including threat modeling for AI systems, attack surface analysis, and control gap identification.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI RM domain. RM-S-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-S-008 (SP, cosine: 0.488), RM-T-002 (RM, cosine: 0.481).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 2.5/10 (raw 0.247). Shared vocabulary: [security]. DCWF-only terms [approved, defense, defenses, depth, employ, layered] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, analysis, assessments, attack, conducting, control] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.863 (P=0.862, R=0.863). Balanced P/R — the 13-word DCWF element and 19-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.1%). "Employ approved defense-in-depth principles and practices (e.g., defense-in-mult" and "Skill in conducting AI security assessments, including threat modeling for AI sy" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.531 > STS 0.247 (gap +0.284). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [security] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 9.7%. Shared tokens: [security]. DCWF-only: [approved, defense, defenses, depth, employ, layered]. WIDAI-only: [ai, analysis, assessments, attack, conducting, control].
